title: Finance Bill 2023
summary: Introduced housing levy and revised income tax bands. Triggered public protests over cost-of-living impact.

title: Data Protection Amendment Bill 2023
summary: Seeks to strengthen enforcement of the 2019 Data Protection Act and mandate breach notification timelines.

title: National Cohesion Amendment Bill 2023
summary: Stiffens penalties for hate speech and requires political parties to maintain diversity in candidate lists.

title: Affordable Housing Levy Bill 2023
summary: Mandates 1.5% payroll deduction to fund the Affordable Housing Programme.

title: Public Finance Management Amendment Bill 2023
summary: Proposed tighter reporting requirements for supplementary budgets. Withdrawn after Treasury objections.

title: County Governments Additional Allocations Bill 2024
summary: Released KSh 89.8B in additional equitable share to counties for FY 2023/24.

title: Tax Laws Amendment Bill 2024
summary: Revised excise duty on financial transactions and imposed digital asset tax of 3%.

title: Finance Bill 2024
summary: Proposed broad new taxes including a motor vehicle circulation tax. Withdrawn after June 2024 protests.

title: Water Services Amendment Bill 2024
summary: Proposes devolution of bulk water infrastructure management to county governments.

title: Startup Bill 2024
summary: Provides tax incentives and simplified registration for early-stage Kenyan tech companies.
